title: Autonomous Multi-Agent AI Debating Society
blurb: A modular platform where AI agents debate autonomously using local LLMs and a custom PDF-based RAG pipeline.
description: A debating arena where multiple autonomous agents argue, rebut and reach positions on their own. Each agent reasons over a shared knowledge base built from PDFs through a custom retrieval pipeline, running entirely on local models — no cloud dependency.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation System
blurb: Conversational AI using vector retrieval + LangChain orchestration to ground answers in real documents.
description: A production-style RAG stack: documents are embedded into a vector index, retrieved by semantic similarity, and orchestrated through LangChain to generate accurate, context-aware responses with a local Ollama LLM — fast, private and verifiable.

title: Tubelight Communications
blurb: Multiple verticals: API design, website and SaaS delivery.
description: End-to-end work across several product verticals — designing clean OpenAPI specs, shipping the marketing website, and building SaaS surfaces with proper API documentation.

title: TextEdu
blurb: An online SaaS for multi-channel messaging and analytics.
description: A SaaS platform for multi-channel messaging with built-in analytics — covering app architecture, optimization and ongoing code review.

title: SaaS Builder's Guide
blurb: Getting started with building your own software-as-a-service platform.
description: A practical guide to standing up a SaaS from zero — architecture, tooling, planning and the project-management discipline it takes to ship.

title: Guide to Deno
blurb: Getting started with Deno — the hard and dirty way.
description: A hands-on introduction to the Deno runtime and its TypeScript-first model, written for builders who learn by shipping.

title: expediteJS
description: A CLI that scaffolds and builds Progressive Web Apps quickly, removing boilerplate so you get to a working PWA in minutes.

title: Websites for Harper Collins
blurb: Custom marketing sites for new books and authors.
description: A set of bespoke marketing microsites built to launch new books and authors — fast, responsive and design-led.

title: The Medley
blurb: An online journal for a writers' group.
description: A lightweight publishing platform for a writers' community, built on Jekyll with a custom editorial design.

title: Vedanthems Nutratech
blurb: Logo, packaging and website design for a foodtech startup.
description: Full brand and digital identity for a nutrition startup — logo, packaging system and a marketing website.

title: The Gentleman Show
blurb: Logo and production management for a podcast.
description: Visual identity and production support for a podcast — logo system, graphics and the workflow behind the episodes.

title: Web Experiments
blurb: Eye-catching experiments with CSS, JS and motion.
description: A playground of interactive CSS and JavaScript experiments exploring animation, motion and the edges of the browser.
